data.description: A recent report indicates that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.8%, with over 250,000 new jobs created in the last quarter. This marks a significant improvement in the labor market, as more people are finding employment opportunities. Additionally, the report shows that the economy has grown by 4.5% in the last year, which is the highest growth rate in over a decade. Experts suggest that these positive trends are indicative of a strong and healthy economy, which is expected to continue its growth trajectory in the coming months.

data.title: Westcliff University Opens First Campus in Canada to Help Bridge the Talent Gap in Toronto's Surging Tech Hub
data.description: Westcliff University, known for career-focused higher education, recently launched its inaugural Canadian campus in Markham, Ontario, within the historic IBM building. The campus celebrates its grand opening alongside ventureLAB's innovation hub, set in a 50,000-square-foot space. This expansion comes at a critical juncture as Canada faces a significant scarcity of skilled technology professionals. Westcliff University aims to address this issue by providing educational opportunities in the region.

data.title: Liftoff Welcomes Former J.D. Power CEO, Dave Habiger and Former Apple Controller, Betsy Rafael to its Board of Directors
data.description: Liftoff, a leading company in performance marketing and monetization solutions for mobile apps, based in REDWOOD CITY, Calif., has recently made new additions to its board of directors to enhance operational and financial expertise. As of April 30, 2026, the company aims to expedite its growth phase with these strategic appointments. The key focus is to leverage the experience and skills of the newly appointed board members to drive success in the rapidly evolving mobile app economy. Stay tuned for the exciting developments ahead in Liftoff's journey towards advancement.
